3148770.name: Time Wars
3148770.description:
The Game
Time Wars is a Tower Defense, with a sprinkle of action & rpg mechanics. Like in previous tower defense games you'll have a a lot of defenses, upgrade options and tons of maps. What sets us apart is that once you've decided on your strategic approach you can join the fray with one of four distinct heroes. The heroes will level up over time and all have unique abilities and passive properties to discover. With unforgettable boss battles and exciting secret levels to discover we're sure there is something for everyone. Careful though the game is easy to learn, but difficult to master and can present a challenge to even the most die hard gamer.

The Story
Time Wars puts you at the forefront of a battle with alien time travelers invading humanity not just in the present, but throughout various periods in mankind's history. You'll be battling brainwashed dinosaurs in the Prehistoric ages with cavemen. Hunting mind controlled dragons in the Medieval times with crossbowmen. Curing an alien plague aboard an airship in the Renaissance. Introducing aliens to the smell of napalm in the morning in our Modern age, and taking the battle to their homeworld in a distant Future.
